# netbox_device_interface (Resource)

Manages a Device Interface in Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_device_interface" "example" {
  device_id   = netbox_device.example.id
  name        = "lo"
  type        = "virtual"
  enabled     = true
  description = "Created via terraform-provider-netbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (Number) The ID of the device this interface belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of the interface.
- `type` (String) The interface type (e.g., virtual, 1000base-t, 10gbase-x-sfpp).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for the interface.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the interface is enabled.
- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the interface.
- `mtu` (Number) The MTU of the interface.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the interface.
